HUMAN Protocol is an open-source platform for ‍

Work & Earn
Launch Jobs
Build

What is HUMAN Protocol?

HUMAN Protocol is an open-source platform that allows for the automated launching, evaluation, and payment of different kinds of work. Helping businesses, and individuals, grow.  

Watch Video
1
Launched jobs are split into thousands of tasks
2
Tasks are parcelled out through supported applications to global workers
3
Contributions are verified for accuracy, and rewarded in HMT

Build your way

Build
Launch Jobs
Work & Earn
Use HUMAN’s technology, apps, and SDKs to enhance existing use cases, or create new ones.
Documentation
Launch jobs to globally distributed workforces. Ask questions, receive thousands of responses. Supercharge your business.
Job Launcher
Complete data-labeling tasks on the HUMAN App from anywhere, any time, and receive rewards in HMT. Work that suits you.
HUMAN App

Ecosystem

Learn about the projects that have launched or grown through the HUMAN ecosystem. All supporting the input, output, and transparent compensation of distributed communities.

SLEAP
An open source framework based on deep-learning used for multi-animal pose tracking.
Salk
An independent, nonprofit research institute where world-renowned scientists push the boundaries of knowledge in areas such as neuroscience, cancer research, aging, immunobiology, plant biology, computational biology, and more.
Ramblist
Ramblist is a vision to create the first decentralzied newsroom.
Hummingbot
Hummingbot uses bots to deliver automated market-making (AMM) and aribtrage opportunities.
ME
The first decentralized, multi-vendor customer loyalty ecosystem.
VeritaTrust
Verita Trust are building a system to bring customer reviews on-chain.

Built-on-HUMAN

An open source, semi-automated image and video annotation tool.

Perception Platform streamlines and automates the process of training, deploying, and improving ML models.

Audio-tagging tool supporting the National Health Mission of the Indian Government.

HuFi is a market-making platform that allows for the launching and funding of liquidity campaigns.

“Personally, I'm excited to collaborate with HUMAN Protocol because it is a way to connect Intel technologies with human intelligence at scale to solve hard computer vision problems.”

Nikita Manovich
Deep Learning Manager and Architect of Computer Vision Annotation Tool (CVAT)

“We are excited to support HUMAN by providing them with access to secure and reliable oracle infrastructure and price Feeds to bring about a more robust set of decentralized labor markets.”

Daniel Kochisz
Head of Business Development, Chainlink

“HUMAN Protocol has already made a giant dent in democratizing access to global talent for training machine vision models. They're rapidly executing on de-fragmenting the rest of the machine learning annotation market, which is gigantic.”

Raj Gokal
Chief Operating Officer, Solana

“ Personally, I'm excited to collaborate with HUMAN Protocol because it is a way to connect Intel technologies with human intelligence at scale to solve hard computer vision problems. ”

Nikita Manovich
Deep Learning Manager and Architect of Computer Vision Annotation Tool (CVAT)

“ We are excited to support HUMAN by providing them with access to secure and reliable oracle infrastructure and price Feeds to bring about a more robust set of decentralized labor markets. ”

Daniel Kochisz
Head of Business Development, Chainlink

“ HUMAN Protocol has already made a giant dent in democratizing access to global talent for training machine vision models. They're rapidly executing on de-fragmenting the rest of the machine learning annotation market, which is gigantic. ”

Raj Gokal
Chief Operating Officer, Solana
